title: Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical Device (SAP-SaMD) Meeting Announcement - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical Device (SAP-SaMD) Meeting Announcement

## Announcement of meeting
Ottawa, Ontario January 3, 2018
The purpose of this Notice is to announce an  upcoming meeting of Health Canada’s Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical  Device (SAP-SaMD).
This meeting will examine the regulatory oversight  of the emerging field of software as a medical device.

### Mandate of the SAP-SaMD
To provide timely scientific, technical, and medical  advice on current and emerging issues related to software as a medical device.
The panel will focus on two main issues:
- The definition of SaMD and scope of what would be  considered a medical device; and
- Provide feedback on a preliminary draft SaMD  guidance document.
For more details, please refer to the Terms of  Reference of the SAP-SaMD.
Health Canada will make a presentation to the panel  summarizing background information, to provide context for the questions posed.  This will be followed by presentations by the United States Food and Drug Administration  and industry associations.
Upon completion of the presentations and associated  discussion, the panel will deliberate in a closed meeting before providing  their final advice to Health Canada.
The detailed agenda for the meeting will be posted  at a later date.
